predicate.title: Exclude negative bootstrap bars from the lead-time chart
predicate.problem: the four 2026-07-14 bootstrap rows carry hand-authored, future-skewed opened_at timestamps; their negative lead-time bars stretch the lead chart's axis ~45 minutes into impossible territory and squash the real sub-hour bars into a narrow band — the owner reviewed the dashboard on 2026-07-16 and asked for the negative bars to be removed from the view, replaced by a note
acceptance_criteria: the lead chart plots only rows without the lead_time_inaccurate flag, and an explanatory note under the chart records how many rows are excluded and why, so the defect stays visible
the table and markdown summary keep n/a for excluded rows and --json keeps the raw negative values as the machine-readable record
metric-lead-time documents the exclusion and its History records the owner's 2026-07-16 dashboard review; spec/tools/check.py passes and all three metrics.py output modes render
